description: Remove a free() call in target-b source (dynarray.c, bstree.c, or strmap.c) on a temporary working buffer used during an insert or resize operation, causing a per-call leak that accumulates under repeated invocations.

metadata.notes: Targets free() call sites in dynarray.c, bstree.c, and strmap.c — removes a deallocation to leave heap memory unreleased.
